nasb.text: “Now therefore, write this song for yourselves, and teach it to the sons of Israel; put it on their lips, so that this song may be a witness for Me against the sons of Israel.

esv.text: “Now therefore write this song and teach it to the people of Israel. Put it in their mouths, that this song may be a witness for me against the people of Israel.

cnv.text: 所以，現在你們要為自己寫下這首詩歌來，教導以色列人，放在他們口中，使這首詩歌成為我反對他們的見證。

ccb.text: “现在，你要写一首歌，教导以色列人，让他们背诵，作为我指控他们的证据。
